zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：短线偏强震荡上行
zh.content:
当前BNB/USD报602.76美元，价格运行于20日均线596.07上方，显示中短期趋势仍保持偏多结构。24小时波动区间较窄，最高604.41美元、最低601.01美元，表明市场处于整理阶段，多空力量暂时均衡。

从技术指标观察，MACD数值为5.25216且维持正值区域，反映市场仍存在一定上行动能。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但价格持续站稳20日均线之上，说明买方仍掌握主动权，短期趋势偏向震荡走强。

关键支撑位关注600美元整数关口，其次为596美元附近的20日均线区域。若跌破该位置，可能回测590美元支撑。上方阻力首先位于604.5美元附近，进一步突破后有望测试610美元至615美元压力带。

交易策略方面，激进投资者可关注回踩600至596美元区域后的企稳机会，顺势布局多单；稳健投资者则等待有效突破604.5美元后跟进。若价格失守596美元，应严格控制风险并关注趋势转弱信号。

en.title: Binance Coin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BNB/USD is showing a constructive short-term bullish structure, with price trading at 602.76 and holding comfortably above the 20-period SMA at 596.07. The ability to remain above this moving average suggests buyers continue to defend pullbacks, while the modest 24-hour gain of 0.14% indicates steady accumulation rather than aggressive momentum. Price action near the session high of 604.41 also signals that bullish pressure remains intact despite relatively limited volatility.

Momentum indicators lean positive. The MACD value of 5.25 remains in bullish territory, suggesting upward momentum is still present and trend strength has not fully dissipated. While the signal line is unavailable, a positive MACD reading generally reflects favorable market sentiment. The absence of RSI data limits overbought or oversold assessment, but current price behavior above key moving-average support implies momentum remains tilted toward the upside rather than indicating exhaustion.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around 601.00, corresponding to the recent session low. A secondary and more significant support zone sits near the SMA(20) at 596.00. If sellers push below this area, downside pressure could extend toward the 590.00 region. On the upside, initial resistance appears near 604.50, followed by a stronger barrier around 610.00. A decisive break above resistance could attract additional momentum buyers and open the path toward higher short-term targets.

For trading purposes, bullish participants may consider buying on controlled pullbacks toward the 596–600 support zone while maintaining disciplined risk management below key support. More aggressive traders could wait for a confirmed breakout above 604.50 to validate continued upward momentum. Conversely, bearish positioning appears less favorable while price remains above the 20-period SMA. Overall, the technical outlook remains moderately bullish, with support holding and momentum indicators continuing to favor buyers.
